---
title: "L\'histoire de France depuis les temps les plus reculés jusqu\'en 1789, racontée à mes petits-enfants"
---

## L\'histoire de France depuis les temps les plus reculés jusqu\'en 1789, racontée à mes petits-enfants

**Author:** François Guizot
**Date:** 1870-1876
**Imprint:** Paris: Hachette

### Notes

The fifth volume was completed by Henriette de Witt from her father\'s notes.  In 1878-9 she published a further two volumes, taking the history to 1848.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
